_comment: Source of truth for the Petdex Community Discord server. Apply via the discord-mcp tools using docs/discord/apply-template.md as the prompt. Categories render top-to-bottom in the order listed; channels in each category render top-to-bottom in the order listed.

guild.name: Petdex Community
guild.description: Animated pixel pets for the Codex CLI. Where creators ship, collectors trade, and the Pokédex grows.

roles.name: Petdex Team
roles._comment: Founders + admins. Skip discord ban hammer for these. Clerk admin status is the source of truth, this is just a colored badge.

roles.name: Featured Creator
roles._comment: Manually granted to creators with a dedicated /collections/<slug> spotlight (graycraft, scientific-minds, etc.). Mention them when their collection lands.

roles.name: Creator
roles._comment: Auto-assigned by the petdex bot when a user has 1+ approved pets and links their Clerk → Discord account.

roles.name: Collector
roles._comment: Auto-assigned at 3+ caught pets. Pure flair, feeds the leaderboard rivalry.

roles.name: Verified
roles._comment: Default role granted after passing #welcome onboarding (rules accept). Required to send messages anywhere.

roles.name: Petdex Bot
roles._comment: Granted by the OAuth bot install; never assigned by hand.

channels.name: welcome
channels.topic: Read the rules and pick your roles. Welcome to the Pokédex of pixel pets.

channels.name: announcements
channels.topic: New features, new collections, new featured creators. Read-only.

channels.name: introductions
channels.topic: Tell us your name, your favorite pet, and what you're building.

channels.name: showcase
channels.topic: Every approved pet lands here, posted by Petdex Bot. React, riff, vibe.

channels.name: wip
channels.topic: Share work-in-progress sprites. Honest feedback only. No critique = no growth.

channels.name: collections
channels.topic: Discuss the 10 featured collections. Suggest pets, request new sets.

channels.name: ip-spotlight
channels.topic: Featured creators of the moment: GRAYCRAFT, Scientific Minds, Crafter Originals.

channels.name: general
channels.topic: The default room. Pets, code, life. Keep it kind.

channels.name: off-topic
channels.topic: Anything that isn't pets. Memes welcome.

channels.name: ideas
channels.topic: Pet ideas the community wants to see. Synced with petdex.crafter.run/requests.

channels.name: help
channels.topic: Issues installing the CLI, signing in, or submitting a pet. Search before you ask.

channels.name: dev
channels.topic: For people extending the Codex CLI or hacking on Petdex itself.

channels.name: cli-feedback
channels.topic: Bug reports + feature requests for `npx petdex`.

channels.name: design
channels.topic: Sprite art tips, palette references, animation tricks.

channels.name: ship-or-sink
channels.topic: Weekend build competitions. Theme drops Friday, results Sunday.

channels.name: hackathons
channels.topic: Petdex hackathon announcements + team-finding.

channels.name: co-working
channels.topic: Silent co-work room. Camera optional, vibes mandatory.

channels.name: pixel-jam
channels.topic: Live sprite-art jams. Share screen, draw together.

channels.name: office-hours
channels.topic: Open hours with Petdex Team. Drop by Fridays 4pm GMT-5.

categories.name: 🔒 STAFF
categories._comment: Only @Petdex Team + @Petdex Bot can see this category.

channels.name: admin
channels.topic: Admin coordination: pet approvals, collection curation, comms.

channels.name: moderation
channels.topic: Moderation queue + member reports. Action log lives in #bot-logs.

channels.name: bot-logs
channels.topic: Webhook events from petdex.crafter.run + bot action audit trail.

automations._comment: Bot listens to a webhook from petdex.crafter.run/api/discord/webhook (we'll wire that). Looks up the submitter's linked Discord account and grants @Creator if not already.
After accepting rules in #welcome, the bot grants @Verified and unlocks send-message permissions everywhere.

_followups: Enable Community features: Server Settings → Enable Community → set rules + community updates channel + safety contact email.
Enable Discovery (later, when 100+ members) so we appear in Discord's server browser.
Enable AutoMod: profanity filter, mention spam (5+ in 60s), suspicious link blocker.
Configure server boosts threshold messages: post a thank-you in #general at every level milestone.
